items.example: These people have to be hard-working and motivated.
He is very ambitious and wants to be successful.
He's very competitive and hates to lose.
They are a group of very motivated students.
Being a racing driver, Anton has to be a risk taker.
She's a very good leader who listens to people.
I find it difficult to make decisions. I'm a bit indecisive.
We need to be creative and think outside the box.
In this job you need to think outside the box.
He is a good communicator, so people enjoy listening to him.
